ACADEMICS
HIGH STANDARDS. BEST QUALITY. TOP RESULTS
ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR
LEARNING MEETS EXCELLENCE
At Sri Eshwar, we are committed to nurture the next generation of engineering leaders by seamlessly integrating theory and practice into our curriculum. Our continuously evolving, project-based curriculum, coupled with strong industry collaboration, fosters innovation and excellence, turning your ideas into real-world solutions.
Join us to experience a world-class engineering education!
EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING
SMART CLASS ROOMS
INDUSTRY ALIGNED CURRICULUM
INDUSTRY MENTORSHIP
LEADERSHIP
Dr.R.K.Suresh
Dean – Academics
Know more
Dr.R.Deepa
Professor & Associate Dean – Academics Planning & Performance
Know more
academic courses
We offer a project-based curriculum featuring a blend of integrated theory, practical and project-based courses which is continuously updated in consultation with industry experts. The project components of our courses are delivered by industry experts and industry-trained faculty, emphasizing hands-on learning and real-world application, ensuring our students are well-prepared to excel in the dynamic engineering landscape.
This unique approach not only enhances students’ learning but also equips our students to succeed in contests, hackathons and
setting them apart in the competitive job market.
ACADEMIC COUNCIL
Academic Council is a very important and integral part of the growth of the institution. The council’s constant support and inputs are valuable to us and helps us in our mission to offer the best academic courses to our students.

Doctorate Programmes
Anna University Approved Research Institute
Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology,
Science
& Humanities disciplines.
FACULTY DEVELOPMENT
At Sri Eshwar, faculty empowerment is not just a goal but a continuous journey. To ensure our teachers are at the forefront of technological and pedagogical advancements, FDPs are meticulously designed to equip our faculty members with best-in-class teaching skills and cutting-edge knowledge.
Throughout the year, we conduct a series of FDPs, each crafted to bring about a positive transformation in our faculty members. The selection of FDP topics is strategically aligned with the semester-wise curriculum to ensure relevance and impact. We pride ourselves on bringing in resource persons from nationally reputed institutions and leading industries.Our faculty members also regularly participate in weekly pedagogy sessions to enhance their teaching strategies.
TEACHING & LEARNING
At Sri Eshwar, we quickly implement and adapt to new and modern teaching and learning methodologies. Our classrooms are equipped with wi-fi and smart interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. All students of the class can plug in their laptops to dedicated power outlets, to enable a truly hands-on learning experience.
Our faculty are trained to use various software and simulation tools, enabling interactive learning experiences. We leverage Google Classroom and Moodle LMS for implementing hybrid and flipped classroom models, ensuring seamless online course content design and assessment. By prioritizing hands-on learning, critical thinking, and continuous professional development, we create an enriching academic environment that inspires excellence and innovation.
